blockedAssertions.title: Assessment list displays
blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Browser automation infrastructure failure: missing libatk-1.0.so.0 system library (Round 3). Code analysis confirms implementation.
blockedAssertions.codeAnalysis: app/routes/assessments.tsx implements list view with columns: Peserta, Template, Skor, Status. All labels in Indonesian. getAssessments() server function returns paginated data with pagination controls.
blockedAssertions.verificationAttempt: Round 3 attempted: agent-browser install succeeded for Chromium binary, but agent-browser install --with-deps failed (requires sudo). Browser launch failed with same libatk-1.0.so.0 error.

blockedAssertions.title: Create assessment attempt
blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Browser automation infrastructure failure: missing libatk-1.0.so.0 system library (Round 3). Code analysis confirms implementation.
blockedAssertions.codeAnalysis: app/routes/assessments.new.tsx implements form with participant dropdown (mitra/candidate/penyelia_halal partners), question_bank selection filtered by purpose='self_assessment'. createAssessment() server function creates assessment_attempts record with started_at timestamp and redirects to /assessments/:id/take.
blockedAssertions.verificationAttempt: Round 3 attempted: Same infrastructure blocker. Server running on port 3002 confirmed via curl.

blockedAssertions.title: Assessment form renders with question types
blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Browser automation infrastructure failure: missing libatk-1.0.so.0 system library (Round 3). Code analysis confirms implementation.
blockedAssertions.codeAnalysis: app/routes/assessments.$id.take.tsx implements renderQuestionInput() supporting: short_text (input), long_text (textarea), single_choice (radio), multiple_choice (checkbox), rating (1-5 buttons), boolean (Ya/Tidak radio), date (date picker). Navigation via Sebelumnya/Berikutnya. Auto-save with 1-second debounce.
blockedAssertions.verificationAttempt: Round 3 attempted: Browser still blocked by missing GTK libraries.

blockedAssertions.title: Submit assessment responses
blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Browser automation infrastructure failure: missing libatk-1.0.so.0 system library (Round 3). Code analysis confirms implementation.
blockedAssertions.codeAnalysis: app/server/assessments.ts saveAssessmentResponse() saves to assessment_responses table. submitAssessment() finalizes with submitted_at timestamp, calculates scores, redirects to results page.
blockedAssertions.verificationAttempt: Round 3 attempted: Browser launch still fails.

blockedAssertions.title: Objective scoring
blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Browser automation infrastructure failure: missing libatk-1.0.so.0 system library (Round 3). Code analysis confirms implementation.
blockedAssertions.codeAnalysis: app/server/assessments.ts submitAssessment() calculates objective_score from question_options.is_correct and score_value. Essay questions tracked separately. Results displayed in assessments.$id.results.tsx with Total Skor, Skor Objektif, Skor Esai breakdown.
blockedAssertions.verificationAttempt: Round 3 attempted: Browser dependency issue persists.

blockedAssertions.title: Indonesian language
blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Browser automation infrastructure failure: missing libatk-1.0.so.0 system library (Round 3). Code analysis confirms all UI labels in Indonesian.
blockedAssertions.codeAnalysis: All UI labels in Indonesian across all assessment files: Daftar Penilaian, Peserta, Template, Skor, Status, Belum Dimulai, Sedang Dikerjakan, Sudah Disubmit, Sudah Direview, Mulai Penilaian Baru, Kerjakan Penilaian, Jawaban Anda, Sebelumnya, Berikutnya, Submit Penilaian, Menyimpan..., Tersimpan, Total Skor, Skor Objektif, Skor Esai, etc.
blockedAssertions.verificationAttempt: Round 3 attempted: Cannot verify via browser. Code inspection confirmed Indonesian labels.
blockedAssertions.altVerification: curl http://localhost:3002/login returns HTML shell with lang='id' (confirmed Indonesian locale).

systemicIssues.description: Browser automation tool (agent-browser/Playwright) cannot launch due to missing system-level GTK libraries (ATK accessibility toolkit). Playwright Chromium binary requires libatk-1.0.so.0, libatk-bridge-2.0.so.0, libatspi.so.0, libXdamage.so.1.
systemicIssues.error: /home/riz/.cache/ms-playwright/chromium_headless_shell-1208/chrome-headless-shell-linux64/chrome-headless-shell: error while loading shared libraries: libatk-1.0.so.0: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory
resolutionAttempted: Round 1: agent-browser install, agent-browser install --with-deps, npx playwright install-deps chromium - all failed due to sudo requirement
Round 2: agent-browser install (succeeded for Chromium binary), agent-browser install --with-deps (failed - requires sudo password), browser launch (failed)
Round 3: agent-browser install (succeeded), agent-browser install --with-deps (failed - sudo requires password), browser launch (failed with same error)
systemicIssues.blocker: System-level GTK libraries (libatk1.0-0, libatk-bridge2.0-0, libatspi2.0-0) cannot be installed without root/sudo access. This is a persistent infrastructure blocker across all 3 rounds.
systemicIssues.persistence: Issue persisted across Round 1, Round 2, and Round 3. Requires system administrator intervention.

features: Displays list with Peserta, Template, Skor, Status columns
Pagination support (>20 items) with Sebelumnya/Berikutnya navigation
Status badges (Belum Dimulai, Sedang Dikerjakan, Sudah Disubmit, Sudah Direview)
Participant dropdown populated from getAssessmentFormOptions() - filters partners by types: mitra, candidate, penyelia_halal
Question bank selection filtered by purpose='self_assessment'
Form validation: 'Peserta wajib dipilih', 'Template pertanyaan wajib dipilih'
Renders all question types from database
indonesianLabels: Jawab semua pertanyaan dengan jujur dan akurat
Apakah Anda yakin ingin membatalkan? Jawaban yang belum disimpan akan hilang.

features: Objective score calculation based on question_options.is_correct flag
Essay score tracking (0 for objective questions, stored for manual review)
submitAssessment() finalizes and stores all scores
assessmentScoring.scoringLogic: For objective questions: if selected_option.is_correct=true, add score_value * weight. Essay questions start with score=0 (manual grading).

features: Score summary cards (Total Skor, Skor Objektif, Skor Esai)
Correct answer display for missed objective questions

indonesianLanguage.evidence: All UI files use Indonesian labels exclusively. HTML lang attribute set to 'id' (Indonesian). Date formatting uses 'id-ID' locale.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated Round 3 status - confirmed browser automation still blocked. Added server verification (port 3002 responding) via curl.

recommendation: Persistent browser automation infrastructure blocker confirmed across 3 rounds. System-level GTK libraries (libatk1.0-0, libatk-bridge2.0-0, libatspi2.0-0) must be installed by system administrator with sudo. Until then: 1) Code analysis confirms all assessment-system features are correctly implemented, 2) Alternative verification via API testing (curl) confirmed application is running, 3) Manual browser testing by human operators required for visual verification.
conclusion: Round 3 confirms infrastructure blocker. All 6 assertions remain blocked. No flow validators were spawned due to browser tool failure. Application server verified running on port 3002 via curl.

infrastructureStatus.curlVerification: Success - /login endpoint returns HTML shell with lang='id'
